claims: The skill requests the ability to execute any Bash command (`Bash(cmd:*)`), which is excessive for its stated purpose of generating and assisting with Graphviz DOT files. While it may need to run Graphviz-specific commands or perform file operations, unrestricted Bash access poses unnecessary security risks and allows actions unrelated to visual content generation, such as accessing sensitive system data or modifying unrelated files.
